rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings.
Insert implementation-level assignments only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity by referencing only visible identifiers from the model.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers or use event ports as numeric values in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax.
Implementation contracts use assign for output bindings; type contracts use guarantees for dependencies.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
